uplink.description: Status report: 3.0 V, cumulative work-duration 18489621 s
uplink._note: Upstream oracle (reference/upstream-codec.js) decodes Volt=3, WorkDurationTime=18489621. WorkDurationTime is the cumulative work-duration counter in seconds, mapped 1:1 to device.runtime; Volt (0.1 V) -> battery V.

uplink.description: Status report with low-battery flag: 2.9 V, runtime 3600 s
uplink._note: Synthetic. bytes[3]=157=0x9D: high bit set -> lowBattery true; 0x9D & 0x7F = 29 -> 2.9 V. Upstream oracle yields Volt='2.9(low battery)', WorkDurationTime=3600.
bytes[2]==0x00 is the device-info report (Device/SWver/HWver/Datecode upstream); no measurement -> error.

uplink.description: Config response frame on fPort 7 (no measurement)
uplink._note: fPort 7 carries ConfigReport request/response frames (upstream ConfigReportRsp/Status); no measurement -> error.
